title: Origins x Trinkets: Example Pack
description: A example datapack for the Origins x Trinkets mod.
body: A simple example datapack, and resource pack for the mod [Origins x Trinkets](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/origins-x-trinkets). I am friends with the mod creator, and he requested me make something for him. So i did. It adds two neat trinket items to your game with simple effects.
